title: CVE-2026-14266: 7-Zip XZ Archive RCE
summary: [P2] A heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in 7-Zip allows for remote code execution when opening crafted XZ archives. No patch is currently available for this vulnerability. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.80)
